title: fix: match the auth modal backdrop to the app background
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
The `AuthModal` positioner painted its full-bleed backdrop with `bg-theme-bg-pale` — a warm, theme-tinted surface. Standalone that reads as a soft modal scrim, but embedded full-bleed in `/play` it fills the whole iframe and clashes with the website's neutral `bg-app-bg` page background (cream vs. gray).

- Switch the positioner backdrop to `bg-app-bg` — the same neutral, theme-independent token the website and apps use for their page background — so the auth surface matches the page everywhere (light and dark).
- The white card (`surface-white`) and the inner accent panels (the "Authorize" strip, info cards) are unchanged, so it doesn't go flat.

Verified: the generated `polli:bg-app-bg` utility resolves to `var(--polli-color-app-bg)` — identical to the website background — and biome/build are clean. Full visual confirmation lands once enter redeploys with this.

gist.headline: Seamless auth screens
gist.blurb: The auth modal backdrop now perfectly matches the app background. A tiny CSS change for a much smoother, clash-free login experience.
gist.summary: Switched the AuthModal backdrop token from bg-theme-bg-pale to bg-app-bg to prevent visual clashing when embedded full-bleed in the /play iframe.
gist.impact: Users will see a seamless, matching background color when the authorization modal appears, eliminating the previous cream-on-gray mismatch.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a painter, carefully matching the color of a floating digital window to the wall behind it. Represents UI polishing and color matching.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, using a brush to paint a floating digital pop-up window so it perfectly matches the soft cream wall behind it. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays clean UI elements. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
